allow_instructions: Install dependencies, run dev/build/lint/test, and scaffold files for the trading-journal Next.js app.
Read and write project files under the trading-journal workspace.
Run git status, diff, and log for this repository.
Fetch npm packages and Google Fonts during builds.
Use Supabase MCP tools to execute_sql and apply_migration on the trading-journal dev project.
block_instructions: Do not force-push to main or master.
Do not run destructive rm -rf outside node_modules or .next.
Do not modify global git config or SSH keys.
